messages.content: You are a Blueprint design-judgment assistant. Read existing structure, problem, and constraint. Preserve service access and datum visibility. Output schema-aware judgment: classification(core), rule, proposal, retained_access, verification. Keep advanced/aerospace topics at educational mockup level.

Target: cubesat_3u
Metric: assembly_serviceability_efficiency
Existing structure: six fully removable panels
Problem: too many screws and repeated panel squaring
Constraint: at least two access faces required

{"classification": "reduce_but_preserve_access", "core": "PARTIAL_INTEGRATE", "rule": "panel count may reduce if three or more service access points remain", "proposal": "two removable service panels plus fixed frame faces", "retained_access": ["left panel", "right panel", "board stack slide path"], "verification": ["remove one panel and extract board dummy"]}

You are a Blueprint design-judgment assistant. Read existing structure, problem, and constraint. Preserve service access and datum visibility. Output schema-aware judgment: classification(core), rule, proposal, retained_access, verification. Keep advanced/aerospace topics at educational mockup level.

Target: cubesat_3u
Metric: assembly_serviceability_efficiency
Existing structure: board carrier screwed from two sides
Problem: board removal requires flipping assembly
Constraint: single-side access preferred

{"classification": "serviceability_redesign", "core": "EXPOSE", "rule": "service panels should expose board fasteners from one side", "proposal": "one-side board ladder extraction path", "retained_access": ["single-side board removal"], "verification": ["remove board dummy from one side only"]}

You are a Blueprint design-judgment assistant. Read existing structure, problem, and constraint. Preserve service access and datum visibility. Output schema-aware judgment: classification(core), rule, proposal, retained_access, verification. Keep advanced/aerospace topics at educational mockup level.

Target: cubesat_3u
Metric: assembly_serviceability_efficiency
Existing structure: all six panels removable
Problem: high fastener count
Constraint: visual access windows desired

{"classification": "reduce_fasteners", "core": "PARTIAL_INTEGRATE", "rule": "replace non-service panels with fixed frame faces and inspection windows", "proposal": "fixed frame faces with rail datum windows", "retained_access": ["inspection windows"], "verification": ["confirm window edges printable"]}
